name: @dishine/prompt-library
description: 82+ expert prompt engineering templates. The maintained Prompt Workshop now lives at https://prompt.dishine.it/ (Live Battle & Leaderboard, private accounts & chat, AI chat with files and memory, many more models). This package ships the source-of-truth prompt library and the legacy CLI frozen at v2.4.0 — no further CLI features.
author: diShine Digital Agency (https://dishine.it)
